tspan.style: fill:#1b1b1e; font-family:Fraunces, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-weight:800;
fill:#e0aa50; font-family:Fraunces, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-style:italic; font-weight:500;

svg.desc: A Guide's Life or no Life — wordmark source. NOTE: this SVG references the Fraunces typeface but does not embed it. The letter positions were tuned for the earlier "Outdoor Guide Life" wording and have NOT been re-tuned for the renamed "A Guide's Life" — italic offset is approximate. For production use (social cards, print, etc.) re-export from a vector tool with text converted to outlines/paths AND with the italic position re-tuned. The game's live title screen renders the wordmark as HTML text (see .intro-main / .intro-italic in index.html) so this file is currently used only as a source asset.
